name: Indigo Exploration Inc.
summary: Indigo Exploration Inc., an exploration stage company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in the Republic of Burkina Faso and Canada. It primarily explores for gold deposits. The company holds a 100% interest in the Hantoukoura permit covering an area of 191 square kilometers located to the east of Ouagadougou; and the Lati 2 permit covering an area of 181 square kilometers located in the Boromo greenstone belt. It also has an option to acquire 100% interests in Djimbala project located in Southern Mali, West Africa. The company was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
